zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Lacy於1428年出生在英國越可爾素萊安時，她的父親John de Lacy34歲，母親Florence Molineux20歲。她和Percival Amias至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Lacy was born in 1428, in Southowram, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Lacy, was 34 and her mother, Florence Molineux, was 20. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Percival Amias.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Lacy est née en 1428, à Southowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Lacy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Florence Molineux, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Percival Amias.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Lacy 1428 in Southowram, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Lacy 34 und ihre Mutter Florence Molineux 20. Sie hatte mit Percival Amias mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lacy è nata il nel 1428 nel Southowram, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Lacy, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Florence Molineux, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Percival Amias.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lacyが1428年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウソウラムで生まれた時，父John de Lacyは34歳，母Florence Molineuxは20歳であった。彼女はPercival Amiasとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Lacy(이)가 1428년 영국 요르크실르 소우토램에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Lacy(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence Molineux(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Percival Amias(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Lacy nasceu em 1428, em Southowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lacy, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Florence Molineux, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Percival Amias.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Lacy родилась в 1428 г. в местности соутоурам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Lacy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Florence Molineux, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Percival Amias.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Lacy nació en 1428, en Southowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lacy, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Florence Molineux, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Percival Amias.
